claims.quote: At HSS, we will never stand in the way of fresh and innovative thinking. So when you join us as a nurse anesthetist (CRNA)—an advanced practice nurse (APN)—your ideas and enthusiasm will ensure our medical and nursing practice, and our organization, is constantly growing and improving.
claims.claimText: HSS careers page recruiting Nurse Anesthetists (CRNAs) as advanced practice nurses.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Recruitment page for CRNA staff positions — post-training advanced practice career hiring, not a physician USCE pathway.
claims.limitations: CRNA role, not physician; captured as allied/advanced-practice careers signal.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Additionally, through the Center for Advanced Practice Nursing, CRNAs receive a generous continuing education benefit to support conference registration & travel, along with funding for renewal of professional licensure, board certification, CPR certification, and membership to a professional organization.
claims.claimText: CRNAs receive CE benefit covering conferences, licensure renewal, board certification, CPR, professional org membership.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Employee benefits language for CRNA hires — Tier 3 post-training career benefits.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: When you join HSS as a nurse anesthetist, you’ll receive new employee orientation to the hospital, clinical & logistics orientation, an orientation specifically designed for advanced practice, and EHR (Epic) training for prescribers. You’ll be partnered with an experienced mentor in your service, invested in your success, and receive six to eight weeks of specialty training in your role.
claims.claimText: New CRNA hires get 6–8 weeks specialty training, mentor pairing, AP-specific and Epic orientation.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Onboarding details for hired CRNAs — post-training employment information.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: When you join us as a nurse practitioner (NP)—an advanced practice nurse (APN)—your ideas and enthusiasm will ensure our medical and nursing practice, and our organization, is constantly growing and improving.

claims.quote: As an educator, you’ll collaborate with senior directors in our PA department, working together to drive our educational and professional development initiatives. Here, you’ll supervise processes ranging from staff onboarding, training and curriculum development to continuous learning, mentorship and our CME policies.
claims.claimText: HSS PA Educator role: collaborates with senior directors on onboarding, curriculum, mentorship, CME policies, and FPPE/OPPE.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Describes a specific PA career track (Educator); Tier 3 careers content.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not capture the Educator-track description and its scope of responsibilities.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: As a mobility tech, you’ll work under the guidance of our talented team of skilled professionals, giving them essential support by providing vital patient care work.
claims.claimText: HSS Rehab careers page advertises a separate Mobility Tech support role under skilled-professional guidance (allied-health support, not physician).
claims.limitations: Allied-health support role, not physician or USCE-eligible.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Recruitment language for a distinct allied-health support role (Mobility Tech) — career/practice tier.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 grouped all rehab roles under PT/OT/ST therapists; missed the separately-described Mobility Tech role family further down the page.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Our therapy and performance services are centered in the New York area, although our network extends to New Jersey, Connecticut and Florida through our regional locations.
claims.claimText: HSS Rehab career footprint extends beyond NY to regional locations in NJ, CT, and FL.
claims.limitations: Geographic scope of rehab careers; not USCE-related.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Geographic context for career postings — practice/career tier.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the role types but did not record the multi-state regional footprint (NJ/CT/FL) relevant to career-lane geo-targeting.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Our advanced clinicians combine traditional and latest treatment approaches to help our patients get to what they need and love to do. Here, you’ll have the opportunity to evaluate and treat patients while leading and inspiring a team of world-class therapists.
claims.claimText: HSS Rehab careers page describes a distinct Advanced Clinician role that evaluates/treats patients and leads therapist teams.
claims.limitations: Allied-health leadership role; not physician GME or USCE.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Recruitment language for an Advanced Clinician lead role — career tier.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1's role claim only named PT/OT/ST therapists; the page separately enumerates Advanced Clinicians as a distinct lead role.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only
